category_sources: source_facts.description says whitespace formatter for query languages; official repository About says a whitespace formatter for different query languages.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading uses SQL Formatter.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages homepage and official README contain usage, CLI, configuration, language options, and FAQ documentation.
